coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 0% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 70% for 12:36. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 70% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 70% FTP. This is so easy it's almost boring. Almost.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First block at 105%. This is race pace. If you can't hold this, you can't race. Simple.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First threshold block. 95-105% FTP. Settle in — don't overcook the start.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Starting threshold work. This is the bread and butter of cycling fitness. Embrace it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting threshold work. Fun fact: FTP stands for 'Finally This Pain.' (It doesn't, but it should.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: First threshold block. 18:54 at 95-105%. Smooth and steady.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/3. 6:18 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/1. 55% FTP, Seated. 6:18. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 2/3. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 1 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/3. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 6:18 at 55%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last threshold block. 105% FTP. One more step toward crushing your old FTP. Worth it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final threshold block: 18:54 at 105%. Then 12min easy. Hold power steady.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last threshold block. Then 12min easy. Make this one count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Last one. Then 12min to contemplate your life choices. 105% FTP.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final block. 105% × 18:54. Give it everything. 12min cooldown coming.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 56 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 81% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-100 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 81% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 56 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 0 minutes total. You've got this.
